ready_for_verification: Yenge na bosolo mpo na Kondimama
ready_for_verification_description: Ozali na batemwe {count} oyo bandimami. AFROLOC na yo ekoki sik'oyo kondimama.
verification_options_description: Pona na banzela ebele ya kondimama mpo na kondimisa boyebani na yo.
verify_process_step_1_desc: Batemwe mibale kondima ndako na yo
verify_process_step_2_desc: Ba coordonnées ya GPS endimami na bakonzi
verify_process_step_3_desc: AFROLOC na yo ekómi identité ya ofisiele
verify_process_step_4_title: Etape 4: Kobongisa ya Ntango na Ntango
primary_residence_updated: Ndako na yo ya liboso ebongwani malamu
primary_residence_info: Oyo ezali adresse na yo ya sika mpo na bozongisi na bakonzi
about_description: Kobongola bisika ya numérique na Afrika na nzela ya teknoloji oyo ezali kosangisa bato nyonso, kondimama na communauté mpe géoréférencement ya malamu.
mission_text: Kopesa mwana-mboka Afrika nyonso adresse numérique ya ndenge moko, oyo ekoki kondimama mpe oyo etikalaka, kolendisa bosangani ya mbongo, kokóma na misala ya ntina mpe kolendisa boyebani ya kontiná.
vision_text: Kokóma système ya adresse numérique ya kontiná oyo etalisamaka, kosangisa bato ya Afrika koleka milliard 1 mpe kosala lokola infrastructure ya ntina mpo na bokoli ya likolónó na kontiná.
values_subtitle: Mibeko ya ntina oyo ezali kotambwisa mabongo nyonso mpe misala
value_inclusion_desc: Tondimi ete mwana-mboka Afrika nyonso asengeli na adresse numérique oyo ekoki kondimama, kozanga kotala esika to eloko ya économie na ye.
value_security_desc: Tobateli boyebani mpe bosekrete ya basaleli na nzela ya kondimama na communauté mpe chiffrement ya likolo.
value_community_desc: Système endimama na communauté yango moko, kondimisa bosolo mpe kolendisa masanga ya communauté.
value_interoperability_desc: Totongaka système ya kontiná oyo esalaka koleka mindelo, kosangisa Afrika mobimba.
journey_subtitle: Longwa na likanisi tii na bosolo ya kontiná
team_subtitle: Bato ya mayele bapesami mpo na kobongola bisika ya numérique na Afrika
cta_about_description: Zala eteni ya mouvement oyo ezali kobongola bisika ya numérique na Afrika
timeline_conception_desc: Kobanda kobongisa likanisi ya adresse numérique ya kontiná mpo na Afrika
timeline_prototyping_desc: Kobongisa ndakisa ya liboso mpe komeka na ba communauté na Angola
timeline_community_validation_desc: Kotia système ya kondimama na ba témoins mpe ba nivo ya kondimama
timeline_regional_expansion_desc: Kobanda na bikolo ebele ya Afrika na lisungi ya minoko mingi
timeline_financial_integration_desc: Bosangani na ba institutions ya mbongo mpo na bosangani ya banque
timeline_public_api_desc: Kobanda API ya polele mpo na ba développeurs mpe ba entreprises
team_ceo_desc: PhD na Systèmes d'Information Géographique, bambula 15 ya boyebi na infrastructure numérique ya Afrika.
team_cto_desc: Ingénieur mokonzi ya kala ya Google Maps, spécialiste na géoréférencement mpe systèmes ya kokabwana.
team_community_desc: Atambwisaki ba projets ya bosangani numérique na bikolo 12 ya Afrika, ayebi minoko 6 ya Afrika.
team_engineering_desc: Architecte ya systèmes na boyebi na ba plateformes ya minene mpe blockchain.
admin_login_subtitle: Esika ya kobatama - kaka bato oyo bapesami nzela
admin_security_notice: Porte oyo ya kokota ezali kaka mpo na ba administrateurs ya système. Mibondeli nyonso ya bokoti ekomami mpe etalelami.
access_denied_admin: Bokoti eboyami. Ndingisa ya mokambi esengeli.
welcome_admin: Boyei malamu na tableau de bord ya bokonzi
max_attempts_exceeded: Essais elekaki. Sengi code ya sika.
verify_phone_first: Svp, vérifier telefone na yo liboso
passwords_do_not_match: Ba mot de passe ekokani te
too_many_attempts: Mibondeli mingi. Meka lisusu na sima.
download_app_subtitle: Kozwa système ya koyeba bisika mbala moko na téléphone na yo
contact_subtitle: Équipe na biso ezali prêt pona kosalisa
fill_form: Kotisa formulaire mpe tokozongisa mbala moko
subject: Sujet
message_placeholder: Limbolá demande to motuna na yo...
faq_subtitle: Zwa biyano na mituna oyo etunami mingi mpo na AFROLOC
pricing_subtitle: Pɔna plan oyo ekoki na bosenga na yo
ios_important: Likambo ya ntina mpo na basaleli ya iPhone/iPad
ios_safari_required: Mpo na kotia appli oyo na iOS, osengeli kosalela navigateur Safari. Soki ozali kosalela navigateur mosusu (Chrome, Firefox, etc.), fungola lien oyo na Safari liboso.
scan_qr_code: Tángá Code QR na caméra ya téléphone na yo
qr_instructions: Lakisá caméra ya téléphone na yo na code oyo ezali likolo mpe landá malako mpo na kotia appli
ios_attention: ATTENTION: Talá malamu ete ozali kosalela Safari
ios_step1: Fungolá site oyo na Safari (navigateur par défaut ya iPhone)
ios_step2: Fina bouton ya kokabola (icône ya carré na flèche koleka likolo) na nse ya écran
ios_step3: Kitá na menu mpe finá "Bakisá na Écran d'Accueil"
ios_step4: Finá "Bakisá" na coin ya likolo na loboko ya mobali
ios_step5: Esili! Icône ya appli ekobima na écran na yo ya kobanda
share_text: Tia appli ya AFROLOC na appareil na yo
install_directly: Tia mbala moko na appareil na yo
android_step2: Finá menu (⋮) na coin ya likolo na loboko ya mobali
android_step3: Poná "Tia appli" to "Bakisá na écran d'accueil"
use_smartphone: Salela téléphone na yo mpo na expérience eleki malamu
to_install_mobile: Mpo na kotia appli na téléphone na yo:
scan_qr_above: To tángá Code QR oyo ezali likolo na téléphone na yo
feature_offline_access: Kozwa bisika na yo kozanga internet
pwa_no_store: Progressive Web App (PWA) - Esengeli te kokitisa na boutique ya appli
install_subtitle: Zwa accès na AFROLOC mbala moko uta na aparɛyi na yo
app_already_installed: AFROLOC etiami kala na appareil na yo
benefit_quick_access_desc: Banda mbala moko na écran ya kobanda lokola appli ya mboka
benefit_offline_desc: Kozwa données na yo ata kozanga internet
benefit_native_exp_desc: Interface ebongisamaki mpo na téléphone, kozanga barre ya navigateur
ios_install_step1: Finá bouton ya Kokabola (carré na flèche koleka likolo) na Safari
ios_install_step2: Kitá mpe finá "Bakisá na Écran d'Accueil"
ios_install_step3: Finá "Bakisá" na coin ya likolo na loboko ya mobali
ios_install_step4: Icône ya AFROLOC ekobima na écran na yo ya kobanda
click_to_install: Finá bouton oyo ezali na nse mpo na kotia
android_install_step1: Finá menu (points misato) na coin ya likolo na loboko ya mobali ya Chrome
android_install_step2: Poná "Bakisá na écran d'accueil" to "Tia appli"
android_install_step4: Icône ya AFROLOC ekobima na écran na yo ya kobanda
pwa_preview_note: PWA esalaka malamu mingi soki appli ebimisami. Na aperçu ya AFROLOC, makambo mosusu ekoki kozala na ndelo.
install_after_publish: Mpo na kotia nsima ya kobimisa appli:
chrome_edge_install: Chrome/Edge: Icône ya kotia na barre ya adresse
publish_instructions: Finá bouton "Publish" na AFROLOC mpo na kozwa URL ya production. Na nsima kozwa URL wana mpe icône ya kotia ekobima automatique.
email_invalid: Ndenge ya email ezali malamu te
select_access_description: Pɔna ndenge olingi kokɔta na système
user_type_citizen_desc: Kokoma nkombo ya AFROLOC ya moto moko
hero_title: Adɛlɛsɛ ya dizitalɛ mpo na moto nyonso — ata soki balabala to nimero ezali te.
hero_description: Na Afrika, bamiliyɔ ya bato bazali na adɛlɛsɛ te — mpe soki adɛlɛsɛ ezali te, banki, kotinda biloko, to misala ezali te. Sala AFROLOC na yo: kodɛ ya sɔlɔ oyo ekoki kondimama mpo na esika ofandaka.
continental_system_badge: Systɛ́mɛ ya ba Adɛrɛsɛ Digitálɛ ya Kontiná
why_description: Ba-millions na ba-millions ya ba-Africain — mbala mosusu koleka nkóto 500 — bazali na adɛrɛsɛ ya ofisielɛ te
feature_addressing_desc: Référence géographique ya mbala moko ata na bisika oyo nzela ezali na nkombo te
feature_validation_desc: Systɛ́mɛ ya ba témoins ya pembeni mpe ba autorités ya esika
feature_financial_desc: Kozwa ba services bancaires, crédit mpe assurance
feature_verification_desc: Botali ya automatique sanza 6-18 engebene na zone
feature_interoperability_desc: Ekokani kati na ba pays mpe ba structures administratives
feature_apis_desc: Intégration facile na ba fintechs, ba services postales mpe e-gouvernement
step1_desc: Tyá esika oyo ofandi na ba coordonnées GPS na nzela ya app ya mobile. Systɛ́mɛ ebimisaka AFROLOC ya mwa ntango engebene na esika mpe structure administrative na yo.
step2_desc: Ba voisins misato mpe autorité moko ya esika ba ndimaka esika oyo ofandi. Ba confirmations esalemaka na SMS to signature digitálɛ.
step3_desc: Kobongisa ya automatique na nzela ya ba notifications périodiques (sanza 6-18 engebene na zone). Mbongwana nyonso ekomi na mbala ya ntango.
cta_title: Ozali prêt pona kosala AFROLOC na yo?
cta_description: Sangana na ba milliers ya Ba-Afriquains na ba adresses digitales oyo etalelami
footer_copyright: © 2025 AFROLOC. Systɛ́mɛ ya ba Adɛrɛsɛ Digitálɛ ya Kontiná.
login_description: Kɔta na kɔnti na yo ya identité digitálɛ
register_description: Mikoma mpo na identité digitálɛ na yo
phone_already_registered_desc: Nimero oyo ya telefone ezali na kɔnti mosusu.
use_login_instead: Telefone oyo ekomamá kala. Svp, kɔta.
invalid_credentials: Svp, tyá email mpe mot de passe ya malamu (mini. 6 caractères)
latest_verification: Ba vérifications ya sika ya ba adresses
common_tasks: Misala mpe ba opérations ya mbala na mbala
onboarding_description: Pɔna nyonso oyo etali yo. Yango ekosalisa biso kopesa yo likambu ya malamu.
purpose_delivery_desc: Ba colis, bilei, bosombi na Internet
purpose_postal_desc: Kozwa ba lettres mpe ba documents
purpose_emergency_desc: Esika mpo na ambulance, police, ba pompiers
purpose_government_desc: Ba documents, ba enregistrements, ba impôts
purpose_identification_desc: Identification officielle mpe ba documents ya ndako
purpose_update_residence_desc: Mise à jour adresse ya ba enregistrements oyo ezali
language_updated_desc: Lokota ebongwanami na boyemei kolanda na ekolo oyo eponamaki
basic_info_desc: Tyá mboka na yo mpe esika oyo ozali po topesa yo likambu ya malamu
city_placeholder: Tyá nkombo ya esika oyo ozali
location_detected_desc: Esika na yo emonani na boyemei
location_permission_denied: Ndingisa ya esika eboyami. Fungola GPS.
location_error: Libunga na komona esika. Meka lisusu.
gps_unavailable: GPS ezali te to ekangami. Svp, fungola GPS na ba paramètres ya aparɛyi na yo mpe meka lisusu.
gps_timeout: Ntango esilaki mpo na kozwa esika. Talá na GPS ezali fungolami mpe meka lisusu.
challenge_desc: Ba-millions na ba-millions ya ba-Africain — mbala mosusu koleka nkóto 500 — bazali na adresse officielle te
challenge_step1_desc: Na Kinshasa, Lagos, Luanda mpe bingumba mosusu ya Afrika, ba millions bazali kofanda na adresse officielle te
challenge_step2_desc: Ba-ambulance ekokaki te, ba-lettres ebutani, ba-livraisons ezali mpasi
challenge_step3_desc: Ba-banques ya Afrika basengaka preuve ya ndako oyo bato mingi bazali na yango te
challenge_step4_desc: Esalemi mpo na mpe na Afrika, etosaka ba-réalités na biso ya bingumba
addressing_desc: Géoréférencement direct ata na bisika oyo ezali na ba-rues na nkombo te
addressing_step1_desc: Na périphérie ya Luanda to commune ya Kinshasa, GPS ezongi ndako na yo
addressing_step2_desc: Ebongisami na ba-divisions ya mboka moko na moko: ba-provinces, ba-municipalités, ba-secteurs, ba-quartiers
addressing_step3_desc: AO-LUA-VIA-RAM-Q12-U45 ezongisaka ndako na yo mpo na libela
addressing_step4_desc: Esalaka na internet oyo ekokaki-kokaki te, oyo ezali normal na bingumba ebele ya Afrika
validation_desc: Ba-autorités administratives ya Afrika ba-valider ba-enregistrements
validation_step1_desc: Mosali ya administration locale atyaka na ba-quartiers mpe akomi ba-résidents
validation_step2_desc: Asangisaka ba-enregistrements 50-100 ya quartier moko mpo na validation ensemble
validation_step3_desc: Autorité ya ndako eyebi communauté mpe e-valider authenticité
validation_step4_desc: Emati na municipalité, province, kobatela chaîne ya confiance ya Afrika
financial_desc: Accès na ba-services bancaires, crédit mpe assurance na Afrika
financial_step1_desc: BAI, BCI, Ecobank bandimi AFROLOC pona kofungola ba-comptes ya ba-commerçants informels
financial_step2_desc: Ba-coopératives ya Afrika na IMF bakoki kozwa ba-petits commerçants
financial_step3_desc: M-Pesa, Orange Money ekangaka ba-paiements numériques na adresse physique
financial_step4_desc: Ba-assureurs ya Afrika bapesaka protection na ba-oyo bazwaki yango ata moke te
verification_desc: Mise à jour oyo ebongisami na croissance urbaine ya Afrika
verification_step1_desc: Luanda, Lagos, Kinshasa ezali kokola mbangu: vérification ya sanza 6-6
verification_step2_desc: Ba-zones urbaines oyo ezali stable: mise à jour ya mbula moko ekoki
verification_step3_desc: Notification na ba-canaux oyo balingaka na Afrika ntango ya ko-vérifier
verification_step4_desc: Agent ya communauté atyaka to mutu a-confirmer na poste administrative
interop_desc: Ekokani na ba-pays 54 ya Afrika na ba-structures na yango
interop_step1_desc: Standard oyo AU e-reconnaître esalaka banda Cairo kino na Cape Town
interop_step2_desc: Mboka moko na moko ebatelaka structure na yango: wilaya, région, province, estado
interop_step3_desc: Efacilisaka commerce na ba-communautés économiques régionales ya Afrika
interop_step4_desc: ONU, Banque Mondiale, DHL bayebaka AFROLOC lokola adresse valide
apis_desc: Intégration na écosystème numérique ya Afrika
apis_step1_desc: REST API na ba-exemples pona ba-développeurs ya Afrika pona ko-intégrer pete
apis_step2_desc: Flutterwave, Paystack, Yoco ba-valider ba-adresses na temps réel
apis_step3_desc: Ba-plateformes e-commerce ya Afrika basalelaka AFROLOC pona livraison
apis_step4_desc: Ba-ministères ya gouvernement ya Afrika bakangisaka ba-registres civiles na ba-impôts
process_geo_desc: Tyá ndako na yo na coordonnées GPS na nzela ya app mobile
process_wit_desc: Ba-voisins misato bandimi ndako mpe identité na yo
process_val_desc: Ba-autorités administratives locales bandimi ndako na yo
process_ver_desc: Renouvellement automatique na nzela ya notifications (sanza 6-18 selon zone)
otp_sent_desc: Svp, talá telefone na yo mpe tyá code oyo ozwaki
invalid_phone_operator: Opérateur eyebanaki te mpo na mboka oyo
invalid_phone_format: Format ya nimero ezali malamu te
invalid_phone_number: Nimero ya telefone ezali malamu te. Salela format: +244912345678
phone_must_start_with_plus: Nimero esengeli kobanda na + mpe code ya mboka
phone_verification_required: Vérification ya telefone esengeli mpo na komikoma nyonso
2fa_description: Bakisa couche ya sécurité na kɔnti na yo
forgot_password_description: Tyá email na yo mpe tokotinda yo lien mpo na kobongola mot de passe
reset_email_sent_description: Talá email na yo mpe landá ba instructions mpo na kobongola mot de passe
didnt_receive_email: Ozwi email te? Talá dossier ya spam to meka lisusu.
reset_password_description: Tyá mot de passe na yo ya sika
confirm_new_password: Ndima mot de passe ya sika
update_password: Mise à Jour Mot de Passe
passwords_dont_match: Ba mot de passe ekokani te
password_too_short: Mot de passe esengeli ezala na ba caractères 6 na nse
invalid_reset_link: Lien ya kobongola ezali malamu te to etikali nsima
view_manage_user_levels: Talá mpe simba ba-niveaux ya ndingisa ya basaleli na système
complete_list_users: Liste mobimba ya basaleli mpe ba-niveaux na bango ya ndingisa
logout_success_desc: Obimaki na kɔnti na yo malamu.
dashboard_welcome: Boyei malamu na système ya adressage AFROLOC
quick_actions_desc: Bandá na kokomisa adresse AFROLOC na yo
manage_your_afroloc_addresses: Simba ba-adresses AFROLOC na yo na esika moko
add_first_address_description: Bandá na kobakisa adresse AFROLOC ya liboso na yo mpo na kotyá identité digitálɛ na yo
enter_new_phone_description: Tyá nimero ya telefone ya sika mpo na kozwa code ya vérification
enter_otp_description: Tyá code ya vérification oyo etindami na nimero ya sika
change_phone_warning: Nimero ya telefone na yo ezali identificateur principal. Ba-adresses AFROLOC na yo nyonso ekotikala na kɔnti na yo.
otp_sent_to_phone: Code ya vérification etindami na telefone na yo
failed_to_send_otp: Elongaki te kotinda code ya vérification
phone_is_primary_identifier: Nimero ya telefone ezali identificateur principal ya kɔnti na yo
phone_change_notification_sent: Notifications ya sécurité etindami na ba-nimero ya kala mpe ya sika
phone_change_notifications_info: Okozwa notifications na SMS na ba-nimero ya kala mpe ya sika, plus confirmation na email
phone_change_cooldown_message: Okoki kobongola nimero na yo lisusu na mikolo {days}. Restriction oyo ebateli kɔnti na yo.
phone_change_rate_limit_description: Svp, zela liboso ya komeka lisusu.
recent_activity_desc: Ba-demandes ya sika ya vérification ya ba-adresses
quick_actions_common: Misala mpe opérations ya mbala na mbala
verify_new_identity_desc: Bandá processus ya vérification ya adresse
security_description: Simba ba-options ya authentification na yo
biometric_unavailable: Biométrie ezali te na aparɛyi oyo
remove_biometric_description: Oyo ekolongola ba-credentials biométriques na yo oyo ebombisamaki. Okosengela ko-login na email mpe mot de passe mbala ya nsima.
biometric_setup_instructions: Mpo na kofungola authentification biométrique, kɔta na email mpe mot de passe. Biométrie ekobongisama automatiquement nsima ya login ya liboso oyo elongi.
no_logins_yet: Login biométrique moko te ekomami naino
language_independent_note: Configuration oyo ezali indépendante na mboka oyo eponami mpe ekosalela application mobimba.
complete_profile_to_create: Silisa profil na yo mpo na kosala ba-enregistrements AFROLOC.
create_first_afroloc: Sala AFROLOC ya liboso na yo mpo na kobanda na adressage digital
try_different_search: Meka koluka na maloba mosusu to bongola ba-filtres
error_loading_report: Libunga na kozwa données ya rapport
manage_phone_structures: Simba structures ya nimero ya telefone mpe routage OTP
configure_operator_otp: Bongisa opérateur télécom pona routage OTP
without_country_code: SANS code ya mboka. Kaka ba-préfixes
prefixes_note: Ba-préfixes esengeli kotyama SANS code ya mboka (ex: 923, 924, 925). Système ebakisaka automatiquement code ya mboka na détection.
add_operators_desc: Bakisa opérateurs télécom pona kofungola routage intelligent ya OTP oyo etali nimero ya telefone
delete_operator_confirm: Ozali sûr olingi kolongola opérateur oyo?
preallocate_numbers_desc: Pré-alouer nimero locaux pona validation OTP na division administrative
allocate_number_desc: Alouer nimero ya telefone pona validation OTP na esika moko boye
anti_fraud_desc: Nimero pré-alloués ekitisaka fraude na kotyá na esika na bisika mosusu oyo ba-appels OTP euti na nimero locaux vérifiés oyo etali bisika administratives spécifiques.
no_validation_numbers: Nimero ya validation moko te ebongisami
add_validation_numbers_desc: Bakisa nimero ya telefone ya validation pona kofungola vérification OTP sécurisée mpe localisée
delete_validation_number_confirm: Ozali sûr olingi kolongola nimero ya validation oyo?
realtime_monitoring_desc: Surveillance en temps réel ya événements ya sécurité
detected_events_history: Historique ya événements ya sécurité oyo emonani
add_resolution_notes: Bakisa notes oyo elakisi ndenge événement oyo esilisami
describe_actions_taken: Lakisa ba-actions oyo esalemaki pona kosilisa événement oyo...
failed_to_load_security_data: Elongaki te kozwa données ya sécurité
faq_contact_support: Équipe na biso ya support ezali prêt pona kosalisa
about_subtitle: Mission na biso ya kobongola adressage digital na Afrika
about_mission_text: Kopesa mwana mboka nyonso ya Afrika adresse digitale oyo ekoki ko-vérifiée, kokengela bokɔtisi ya mbongo, accès na ba-services mpe développement socio-économique na nzela ya technologie innovante mpe validation communautaire.
pricing_faq_section: Mituna Oyo Etunami Mingi Mpo na Prix
install_success: Okoki kozwa accès na AFROLOC mbala moko uta na écran principal
install_benefit_fast_desc: Fungola mbala moko uta na écran principal
install_benefit_notif_desc: Zwa ba-mises à jour ya ntina

kpi_avg_verification_time_legend: Ntango ya kati kati na kosala mpe kobongola état ya enregistrement.
kpi_gps_precision_legend: Ntaka ya kati kati na coordonnées ya aparɛyi mpe EXIF ya foto.
kpi_witness_confirmation_legend: Taux ya témoins oyo bakonfirmaki ba-adresses na SMS.

kpi_witness_confirmation_desc: Taux ya témoins oyo bakonfirmaki ba-adresses na SMS.

gps_spoofing_low_accuracy_desc: Bosikisiki ya GPS ya {accuracy}m ezali na nse ya oyo esengelaki

gps_spoofing_rec_outdoor: Kamata foto libanda pona signal malamu
gps_spoofing_no_anomaly: Coordonnées evérifiées. Anomalie moko te emonani.
ats_subtitle: Score ya vérification ya adresse na couches ebele
ats_tooltip_description: ATS ezali score oyo etyiami lokola (0-100) oyo etali bosikisiki ya GPS, signaux télécom, validation EXIF, confirmations ya témoins mpe documentation.
ats_category_gps_description: Bosikisiki ya esika mpe validation GPS
ats_category_telecom_description: Triangulation ya signal mpe validation croisée
ats_category_exif_description: Métadonnées ya foto mpe vérification ya aparɛyi
kpi_region_comparison_desc: Kesela métriques ya certification kati na ba-régions ndenge na ndenge
alert_thresholds_description: Surveillance automatique ya métriques na région
alert_threshold_witness: Taux ya Min ya Confirmation ya Témoins
alert_no_issues: Région moko te na métriques na nse ya thresholds
alert_disabled_message: Fungola alertes pona kolandela métriques régionales
witness_reputation_description: Lokumu ya témoin ecalculée na historique ya confirmations, validations mpe rejections
fraud_history_description: Historique ya mbongwana na lokumu na yo
fraud_no_history: Historique ya lokumu moko te emonanaki
fraud_no_history_hint: Historique na yo ekolakisama awa ntango okotémwañer ba-adresses
fraud_no_witnesses_hint: Ntango okobakisama lokola témoin, ekolakisama awa
fraud_flags_description: Alertes ya comportement suspect oyo système emonaki
fraud_no_flags_hint: Ozali na alerte ya comportement suspect te
fraud_how_it_works: Lokumu ya témoin esalemaka ndenge nini?
fraud_points_confirmation: Pona confirmation moko na moko ya adresse
fraud_points_validation: Pona validation officielle moko na moko
fraud_reputation_influence: Lokumu esalaka na poids ya témoignage na yo na calcul ya ATS
fraud_flags_management_description: Simba mpe talela alertes ya comportement suspect ya témoins
fraud_alert_email_sent: Alerte ya fraude etindami na email na administrateurs
error_sending_email: Libunga na kotinda email ya alerte
search_fraud_flags: Luka flags na nkombo, telefone to code...
resolve_fraud_flag_description: Bakisa notes mpo na résolution ya alerte oyo ya fraude
error_resolving_flag: Libunga na kosilisa flag ya fraude
no_fraud_flags_found: Flag ya fraude moko te emonanaki
admin_only_access: Kaka administrateurs bakoki kozwa accès na lokasa oyo
address_type_informal_desc: Adresse kozanga nzela to nimero ya ofisiɛlɛ
quick_login_available: Login ya mbangu ezali pona aparɛyi oyo
verification_cycle_frequency: Mbala mbala oyo ezali na {score} points ya likama
address_update_description: Tondisa bisika na nse soki nzela na yo ezwi nkombo ya ofisiel to ndako na yo ezwi nimero oyo gouvernement ya esika epesi. Système ekobongola motango ya adresse kofanda informel kokómela formel.
official_name_by_admin: Nkombo ya ofisiel oyo gouvernement epesi
official_number_by_admin: Nimero ya ofisiel oyo gouvernement epesi
address_type_explanation: Sima ya kotondisa nkombo ya nzela MOKO nimero, adresse ekozala na motango ya Formel. Soki te, ekozala Informel. Adresse ekozala Numérique kaka sima ya certification na ba autorités.
delete_address_warning: Ondimi nde okolongola adresse oyo ya AFROLOC? Likambo oyo ekoki kozonga te.
mitigation_add_house_number: Bakisa nimero ya ndako mpo na kokitisa likama
mitigation_digital_frequent_verification: Adresse ya numérique esengeli vérification mingi
mitigation_property_monitoring: Ndenge ya propriété oyo esengeli kolandela mingi
mitigation_gps_required: Coordonnées GPS esengeli mpo na kokitisa likama
mitigation_add_more_witnesses: Bakisa batemwe mingi mpo na kolendisa vérification
mitigation_add_witnesses: Bakisa batemwe mpo na vérification ya communauté
mitigation_improve_ats: Bobongisa score ATS na vérifications mingi
mitigation_low_ats: Score ATS ezali moke - vérifications mingi esengeli
mitigation_over_1_year: Vérification ya lombangu - ya nsuka eleki mbula 1
mitigation_never_verified: Adresse evérifiée te nsima ya enregistrement
witnesses_required_message: Osengeli na batemwe {count} bakonfirmami mpo na kovérifier AFROLOC na yo
witness_contract_legal_note: Motemwe oyo asigné contrat légal konfirmant ete ayebi personne naye mpe avérifie exactitude ya informations ya adresse. Signature ezali na valeur légale.
waiting_for_witness_confirmation: Tozali kozela motemwe akonfirma mpe asigner contrat
once_witnesses_confirm_authority_validat: Soki batemwe bakonfirma, mokonzi akoki kovalidéer AFROLOC na yo
upload_manage_documents_desc: Télécharger mpe gérer mikanda na yo ya vérification ya identité
upload_documents_to_verify: Télécharger mikanda ya identité mpo na kovérifier AFROLOC na yo
quick_action_verify_desc: Okotindamama po obanda mosala ya vérification ya adresse ya sika ya AFROLOC.
quick_action_report_desc: Okotindamama na esika ya kosala mpe kotala ba rapports ya misala.
quick_action_users_desc: Okotindamama na esika ya bokambi ya basaleli ya système.
no_record_found_desc: Adresse oyo ozali koluka emonanaki te to ezali te. Tala identifiant mpe meka lisusu, to zonga na liste ya ba adresses.
no_reports_desc: Vérification moko te ekomamaki na eleko oyo eponamaki. Bobongola eleko ya analyse to zela ba vérifications ya sika esalama.
no_users_found_desc: Mosaleli moko te akokani na ba critères ya recherche. Meka kobongola ba filtres to recherche na yo.
